status_message: Welcome to FitAI! Your first WHOOP sync will happen tonight at 6 AM IST.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
exercises.notes: Keep chest up, knees over toes

exercises.name: Push-ups (Knee if needed)
exercises.notes: Full body straight as a plank

workout.warmup: 5 minutes light cardio (treadmill walk or jumping jacks). Arm circles, hip rotations, leg swings — 10 reps each.
workout.cooldown: 5 minutes slow walking. Stretch quads, hamstrings, chest, and shoulders — 30 seconds each side.
workout.rationale: Starting with a full-body introduction to build movement patterns and assess your current fitness level.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.description: Overnight oats with milk, Activia yogurt, 1 banana or seasonal fruit

meals.name: Dinner
meals.description: Grilled fish/chicken (200g) + sautéed vegetables + 1 cup rice

daily_tips: Drink 3-4 liters of water daily — hydration is critical for fat loss
Get 7-8 hours of sleep. Your WHOOP will track this and adjust tomorrow's plan
Take progress photos every Sunday morning — visual change takes 4-6 weeks to appear
progress_insight: Welcome to your six-pack journey! At 70kg and 5'4", you're starting a transformation that is absolutely achievable. The key is consistency over intensity — trust the process, let WHOOP guide your recovery, and FitAI will adapt your plan daily.
